system.powerDescription:
Elevation or damnation, once per rest you distort the physical and psychic form of a mundane human. The human becomes a drifter of the admin's choice with CAT equal to your own. The newly formed drifter will listen to the next 1/2 CAT simple command(s) you give it. These commands cannot force the drifter to harm itself and will only be followed for a max duration of CAT minutes. After the command(s) is/are fulfilled it loses all allegiance towards you and may attack, flee, or any other aspects of its normal behavior. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily alter the parameter of a roll whilst active.
